articles.title: Microsoft Promises Slew of Windows 11 Changes in Response to "Microslop" Criticisms - TechPowerUp
articles.description: With every Windows 11 update seemingly introducing a new bug or somehow breaking some core functionality, it seems as though trust in Microsoft and Windows is at an all-time low, with the recent "Microslop" insult popping up in online tech circles as a sort o…
